arts.ttl: The future of both Lukas Hradecky and Matej Kovar at Bayer Leverkusen up in the air
arts.sum: Bild reports that the future of both Bayer Leverkusen’s goalkeepers, Lukas Hradecky and Matej Kovar, are up in the air heading into the summer. There is no doubt that Hradecky is…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's Patrik Schick on battling Bayern Munich, form, fitness and more
arts.sum: Back to his very best with 21 competitive goals already this season, Patrik Schick is leading the charge for Bayer Leverkusen as they look to retain their Bundesliga title in a rivalry with Bayern Munich that will now spill over into the UEFA Champions League. I scored a lot of goals for Leverkusen, and we won the Bundesliga, the DFB Cup and the Supercup, and we are in the Champions League .”

arts.ttl: ‘Moving the most’ – Arsenal lined up for transfer scuffle with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Arsenal are still chasing Espanyol goalkeeper Joan García after failing to sign him last summer. On Thursday, AS stated there’s a good a chance for the 23-year-old to join the Gunners in the summer window. Later that day, Marca reported Barcelona are making moves to sign the player desired by Arsenal. arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Bayer Leverkusen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Bayer Leverkusen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Report: Kovar set to be Leverkusen's first choice shot-stopper next season
arts.sum: The Czechia goalkeeper is keen to kick on at Bayer Leverkusen and take over from Lukas Hradecky.

arts.ttl: Nathaniel Brown pens new Frankfurt deal until 2030
arts.sum: The German U21 left-back looks set to be a mainstay in Frankfurt's backline for years to come.

arts.ttl: Official | Eintracht Frankfurt reward Nathaniel Brown with new deal
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt have rewarded breakthrough prospect Nathaniel Brown with a new deal.
